title: Australian Government to Launch Second A$2bn Round of Green Hydrogen Subsidies Later This Year
content: The second round of the Australian governmentâ€™s A$2bn (US$1.3bn) Hydrogen Headstart subsidy programme for green H2 projects is due to kick off later this year, the Australian Renewable Energy Agency (ARENA) has said. The A$2bn funding allocation for second round of Hydrogen Headstart, which offers ten-year production subsidies per kilogram of H2 production, was first announced as part of the federal budget a year ago.
author: Analysts Account
